text.title: BA Trends Summary Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real applications of this methodology. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Summary lists trends but no adoption decision per trend.
antipattern.root-cause: Author treats the summary as news, not a decision artefact.
antipattern.fix: Force a decision enum per trend; reject when missing.

antipattern.symptom: Trends are listed without source URLs or publication dates.
antipattern.fix: Require source field per trend; cross-check URL resolves.

antipattern.symptom: Quarter field is past; nobody refreshed the document.
antipattern.fix: Block consumption when quarter is older than 90 days.
